Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 70
DMG: 30 Dmg Bonus: 217
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: WAR CLR SHD SHM BST BER
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
Easy Quest
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 6:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257273313
194 posts
I made quest to get this numberous times. Did it at about lvl 20, with mah famous Ogre Shammy... Asked somebody to kill Ambassador K'Ryn for me, and then ran to Crushbone and waited for somebody to kill Ambassador D'Vinn. I think I have done the quest for about 4 times... Sold 1, gave 2 for my other chars, and last I just destroyed when I had no use for it... Didn't know how much it worth, and got about 200pp from it when selling. Also, to get it you just HAVE to equip a crude stein when turning the hearts to Lork! Otherwisely he'll give you stein and you gotta do the quest all over again. Happy hunting on this baby! =)
▲ Page top
dmg/dl y
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 1:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767432381
3 posts
Also great for jousting on PvP servers. Works well on bards, quick little buggers.

QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
NightGod
85 posts
Two words my pretties....RIPOSTE DISCIPLINE

THAT'S when you use insane high damage/insane high delay weapons =)
____________________________
Godslayer Talif Yourgirllovesme, Chosen of the Gods
105 Wizard, Drinal, Undivided Faith

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 17 2002 at 10:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why on earth would i want a WEAPON WITH 70 delay i mean i could find something better off a gnoll gesh!!!!

__DEL__1591771942406
27 posts
Is there a weapon out there any slower than this, dang. Someone would be NUTS to use this it.

# Jun 11 2003 at 1:44 PM Rating: Decent

Weight: 0.0
Weapon Skill: Two Hand Slash
Classes: Warrior

drops in tov great for the disc furious agenst monks rog's and war's always use it in duels

Yep delay 150 dmg 45. Good for the first hit but change weapon after that
▲ Page top
Delay
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 2:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750219494
9 posts
Well...it might be 30/70, but remember that weapons with higher delays are granted damage bonuses. Forgive me if i'm incorrect.
▲ Page top
Why?
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 10:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Why would you pay the listed price for this, when the Drakkel Forged Sledgehammer has a better ratio, and is 550 plat less? I read the posts about haste, but the same logic can be used on the other weapon you are comparing it to. If the Gatorsmash becomes better with haste, so does the Drakkel Sledge. And, with this thing, would your skill ever go up? You'd need a training weapon, like the thunderstaff, just to get your skill up between levels. 70 delay, yuck. Of course, it would be a good item to use to calculate the haste effect of other items (except weapons, obviously), since with something this damned slow, the haste would be easy to time.
▲ Page top
RE: Why?
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2001 at 12:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766864590
37 posts
one thing is on tribunal, i know, those hammers (drakkel darkforge) cost 700pp, and this only costs 650pp. however, i do think this is a better item because it has a better max. i know it sounds weird, but when i hit for a lot, it boost my moral.....
▲ Page top
HASTE PEOPLE
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
K. lets say the FBSS has 20% haste (seen SO many numbers so I'm just taking this) Thats makes this a 30/56 maul with a 1.867 ratio. Not including enchanter haste spells (hmm. at that lvl chanters should have Alacrity) which makes the maul (taking max haste that Alacrity gives) 30/28 with a awesome ratio of .934 (thats with the fbss to. w/o it it will be 30/42 with a ratio of 1.4.) Great weapon at this level if you play your cards right.
▲ Page top
RE: HASTE PEOPLE
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 10:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
This assumes you can use haste with this weapon, but not the other. If another weapon has a better ratio before haste, it still will after, except for some of the really fast 1h weapons, that end up reaching the cap. But lets face it, anyone looking at this weapon isn't a primary tank (or shouldn't be), because the taunt on a 70 delay weapon would stink. Also, if you are at the level that you can get haste items, and are grouping with people who can cast haste spells, you should be able to afford much better than this (like a Drakkel Icegrinder), IMHO.
▲ Page top
RE: HASTE PEOPLE
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2001 at 5:53 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Too bad 100% haste is only 50% attack reducing. haste just squeezes (haste%) more attacks in your normal delay. that's the SIMPLEST way to put it

Thus, your "30/56" you get from "20% haste" would actually be closer to 30/62. you'd need 40% haste to bring you down to 30/56. and with max haste at 100%, you could be as low as 30/35 (and almost have one of those 2h primal weapoms ratios lol). Just check to make sure you have a CoF and a 49+ chanter on a leash. Mmmkay?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 9:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) K. lets say the FBSS has 20% haste (seen SO many numbers so I'm just taking this) Thats makes this a 30/56 maul with a 1.867 ratio. Not including enchanter haste spells (hmm. at that lvl chanters should have Alacrity) which makes the maul (taking max haste that Alacrity gives) 30/42 with a awesome ratio of 1.4. Great weapon at this level if you play your cards right.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 9:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ignore this one. the tops ones right. I missed up on this one :^(
Aternative way
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 8:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I also got this weapon by doing the assasin quest in Highkeep. Frogot who you supossed to talk to (One of the plate wearing Guys around the entrance) He will give you a note. Give that to a Halflin in the misty thicket , on top of one of those pillars on that long wall that splits the zone. When you give him the note Him and his friend will attack you ( Killed with my rogue when i was 22 i think. one coned blue other green) only tricky part is a Guard wanders very close to there and will attack you. I got my monk friend to handle this part. He pull the guard way into the newbie zone and feiged. And the guard was stuck attack newbie critters while i was killing the halflins ( WARNING. they jump off the pillar and start running when weak, I jump after and took 100ish damage so be careful) after I killed I looted the head and gave it back to that guy in HK and got this maul. Only prob is I took bad faction hits for rivervale and now the rogues wont train me there (but thats what sneak is for ) . well hope this helps
▲ Page top
Not that bad
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 8:40 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sure It's delay sucks. But the overall ratio is just nasty. If your fighting a caster DONT use, your never inturrupt him. But if your fighting melee's like Gnolls in SK I would definitly use this over a axe of the iron back or other faster 2h weapon (with a worse ratio of corse). And hitting a critcal hit for over 100 damage will just suprise everyone and make the Maul that much better . Just my 2 cps
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 8:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Don't be dumb....you start off with this thing for the first hit...than you switch to a better dly weapon...when they stat running away...throw it back on and that is that.
HEY!

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 02 2001 at 10:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You mean Barbarian Cleric. Yea, that is screwed up. Nobody likes the weapon because of the slow attack delay. Not to mention you have to kill Divinn and Krynn (THAT ARE ON 2 SEPERATE CONTINENTS!) which is not an easy task. Rarity is common. haha Who has ever seen this weapon in use???? It needs to be fixed. If it had an attack delay of 55 it would be more reasonable. Everyone goes for 2 handers so they need to make one handers a little more tantilizing.-(i spell that right?).
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 02 2001 at 10:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) One hander? You mean 2 handers? hehe 2 Brain farts in a row.
